question: Does the response contain exactly three generated images?
Are the images presented in the specific order requested: (1) Aerial view, (2) Indoor infinity pool, (3) Floor plan sketch?
Is each generated image immediately accompanied by a text section describing the architect's design philosophy?
Does the first generated image depict an aerial view of a pure white, geometric architectural structure?
Does the first image show the building cantilevered over a seaside cliff edge with visible waves crashing against the rocks below?
Does the second image depict an indoor infinity pool with a seamless visual merge between the water and the sea/sky horizon?
Does the second image successfully render the specific lighting effect of an orange-pink sunset with visible reflections on the water surface?
Is the third image a 2D floor plan sketch showing identifiable functional zones (e.g., rooms, circulation) rather than a 3D perspective view?
Are the generated images free from severe AI artifacts, such as distorted geometry, impossible physics, or unreadable details in the floor plan?
Does the text content explicitly discuss architectural design concepts (e.g., minimalism, nature integration) rather than merely describing the visual elements?
Does the design philosophy text for the aerial exterior image discuss concepts related to the cantilevered structure or cliff-edge integration?
Does the text maintain a professional architectural proposal tone suitable for a real-world client concept pitch?
Does the text adjacent to the first image accurately describe the specific visual elements shown (white geometric structure, cliff context)?
Does the text adjacent to the second image accurately describe the specific visual elements shown (infinity pool, sunset lighting)?
Does the text adjacent to the third image accurately identify it as a floor plan and reference the spatial layout shown?
Do the exterior and interior images maintain a consistent 'modern minimalist' architectural style and aesthetic?
Are the images inserted at logical breakpoints immediately adjacent to the relevant design philosophy text?
